.Transitions in Sn-116 from the decay of In-116
were recognised by the energies and intensities
Energies and intensities are given for two energy
ranges. Low energies 22 to 1000 keV, and high
energies 4.5 to 6.6 MeV. In the range 1 to 4 MeV
the line density is high and there are no prominent
lines except for In-116 beta decay.
